series_metadata.series_description: Records provided in response to request made by the News Media, various formats include paper, electronic, or microfilm. The request is made by the media to the communications office. Communications obtains requested records from the appropriate division and gives copies to requestor.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 6 months after request is completed then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain 6 months after request is completed then destroy. ; Microform: Retain 6 months after request is completed then destroy., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Trash ; Microform: Erase
